'''Vibroshields''' were weapons used by the [[Akk Guard]]s in the [[Summertime War]] on [[Haruun Kal/Legends|Haruun Kal]].

They were hand-crafted by [[Kar Vastor]] out of [[Ultrachrome/Legends|ultrachrome]] he found in the jungles of Haruun Kal, possibly remnants of the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Starship/Legends|starship]] that brought the [[Korun/Legends|Korunnai]] ancestors to the world in the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]]. The shields were immune to the metal-eating jungle rot of Haruun Kal and also, as superconductors, could not be cut by a [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]]; however, if a lightsaber was held to the metal long enough, it would melt. They also could deflect [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] and [[Slugthrower/Legends|slugthrower]] bolts.

In addition to acting as a shield, they had sharp edges that could be used to cut an enemy. They were equipped with simple electronics that allowed them to vibrate ultrasonically, for additional cutting power.
